## Summary
Describe the change in 1–3 sentences.

## Linked issues
Closes #...

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / chore

## PeerX-specific checks
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` and `npm run lint`
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md if user-facing
- [ ] I have updated relevant docs under `docs/`
- [ ] Telemetry labels / metric names are unchanged unless justified

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable.
